description: Marking an important day in Nicaragua's national calendar, Air Force Day commemorates their aviation history and achievements. To honor this event, our deliciously crisp Kentaste Coconut chips are a fitting tribute.
On this day when Punxsutawney Phil emerges from his burrow, we're celebrating the spirit of anticipation and optimism with our Ranch chips.
event_name: 1887 – In Punxsutawney, Pennsylvania, the first Groundhog Day is observed.

description: Honoring Honduras' cherished celebration, Day of the Virgin of Suyapa. These El Toasted Garlic chips encapsulate the bold flavors and traditions of this significant cultural event.
event_name: Day of the Virgin of Suyapa (Honduras)

description: Honoring the proud moment of Sri Lanka's freedom on their Independence Day in 1948, these Churro with offer a sweet tribute to a cherished milestone.
Today, Finland celebrates Runeberg Day. Join in the festivities with Garlic Rye chips, infusing classic Finnish flavors into each crispy bite - the perfect blend for honoring this national tradition.
Celebrating New Zealand's Independence through Treaty of Waitangi (1840), our Honey Butter chip brings you a taste of their cultural harmony.

Celebrating Parinirvana Day (a significant event in some Mahayana Buddhism traditions occurring on February 15), these Spicy Thai chips are a reflection of the rich flavors and essence of this ancient celebration.
event_name: Parinirvana Day (some Mahayana Buddhism traditions; most celebrate on February 15)

description: Today, amidst days of February's culinary celebration, savor the Wasabi Octopus Chip.
Spicy Paprika takes you on a flavor journey to Eritrea's Fenkil Day, commemorating the Second Battle of Massawa.
event_name: Fenkil Day(commemoration of the Second Battle of Massawa) (Eritrea)

description: On this day in history, Englishman James Oglethorpe founded the Thirteen Colonies' thirteenth colony - Georgia.
event_name: 1733 – Georgia Day: Englishman James Oglethorpe founds Georgia, the 13th colony of the Thirteen Colonies, by settling at Savannah.

description: Today, we honor Black Love Day by savoring Mesquite Barbecue chips.
Today, toast Valentine's Day by savoring the rich flavor of Parmesan Cheese chips  a delicious tribute to love and Italian cuisine.
Today, Russia commemorates its International Duties Memorial Day. Savor the crispness of our Dill Pickle chips, blending tradition and flavor to honor this regional celebration.

On this day in 1918, Lithuania declared its independence from Germany and Soviet Russiaa monumental moment in history. To honor this significant milestone, today's featured chip is the Pisgah Wild Herb Chip.
Smoked Brisket today commemorates Kosovo's independence declaration. Enjoy its smoky flavor that echoes the bold spirit of this historic day, blending tradition with modern freedom.
event_name: Independence Day, celebrates the independence declaration of Kosovo in 2008, still partially recognized.

description: Celebrating Dialect Day from the Amami Islands of Japan, these Jalapeno chips bridge traditional island flavors with spicy zest.
Marking an important day for Mexico's military tradition, our Taco chips offer a burst of authentic Mexican flavors.
Empowering global unity and equality on this day dedicated to social justice, our "Chile Limon" chips serve as a fiery declaration against discrimination.

Inspired by the rich culinary traditions of Vanuatu, especially on Father Lini Day which honors one of Vanuatu's most respected leaders, we bring you a Brisket that embodies the spirit of community and unity this day represents.
Baja Fiery Mango for World Thinking Day honors global camaraderie. These tangy chips dance on your taste buds like the vibrant cultures we celebrate together.
event_name: World Thinking Day (World Association of Girl Guides and Girl Scouts)

description: Mingle today as we celebrate National Banana Bread Day! Let's whisk you back to cozy kitchens and warm ovens with our Classic Banana Split chips.
Marking the day Estonia reclaimed its sovereignty from Russian rule in 1918, these Cream Cheese Herbs chips bring a rich, tangy flavor that echoes the spirit of independence and resilience.
Embracing global unity and the beauty of spring's arrival, our Parmesan Garlic chips offer an exquisite blend inspired by international flavors.
event_name: 1971 – U.N. Secretary-General U Thant signs United Nations proclamation of the vernal equinox as Earth Day.

description: Marking a momentous day in Dominican history, their struggle against Haitian colonialism is vividly encapsulated in these plantain chips.
Today, Finland celebrates its rich cultural heritage on Kalevala Day. Embrace this tradition with our Rye Savory chips, a delightful nod to Finnish flavors and history.
event_name: Kalevala Day, also known as the Finnish Culture Day (Finland)
